recommendations.title: Letters to Santa
recommendations.overview: A romantic comedy set on Christmas Eve in Warsaw and centered around a series of characters.

recommendations.title: Mandela: Long Walk to Freedom
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of Nelson Mandela's life journey from his childhood in a rural village through to his inauguration as the first democratically elected president of South Africa.

recommendations.title: The Last Song
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on a rebellious girl who is sent to a Southern beach town for the summer to stay with her father. Through their mutual love of music, the estranged duo learn to reconnect.

recommendations.title: Love on Safari
recommendations.overview: An American web designer inherits an animal reserve in South Africa. A no-nonsense ranger takes her on a safari in hopes that she will fall in love with the land, the animals and him.

recommendations.title: Tremors 5: Bloodlines
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: When Gummer is hired to capture a deadly creature terrorizing South Africa, he and his new sidekick, Travis Welker, engage in another battle of survival against the fiercely aggressive Graboids.

recommendations.title: Lethal Weapon 2
recommendations.overview: Riggs and Murtaugh are on the trail of South African diplomats using their immunity to engage in criminal activities.

recommendations.title: Tell Me What You Want
recommendations.overview: After his father's death, Eric Zimmerman travels to Spain to oversee his company's branches. In Madrid, he falls for Judith and engage in an intense, erotic relationship full of exploration. However, Eric fears his secret may end their affair.

recommendations.title: We Made a Beautiful Bouquet
recommendations.overview: Two people meet each other after missing the last train home, leading to a beautiful relationship over five years.

recommendations.title: Me, Myself and Her
recommendations.overview: Two women -- a restaurateur and an architect -- have a seemingly idyllic romantic relationship, until the latter encounters a man she had a fling with.

recommendations.title: Cry Freedom
recommendations.overview: A dramatic story, based on actual events, about the friendship between two men struggling against apartheid in South Africa in the 1970s. Donald Woods is a white liberal journalist in South Africa who begins to follow the activities of Stephen Biko,
